calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Billy Martin, General Manager, for Appellant/Defendant West Hotel LLP. Barbara Fitzpatrick, Social Worker, is also present.
Brook Meakins, Esq., for Wayne H. Smith, Respondent/Plaintiff, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Wayne Smith testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Group of 3 pictures
Exhibit 2 - Handwritten letter
Exhibit 3 - UCSF doctor's progress notes
Exhibit 4 - SFDPH Direct Access document, 9 pages

Barbara Fitzpatrick testifies on behalf of West Hotel LLP. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Statement from maintenance lead re safety mats; Exhibit B - Purchase order re safety mats; Exhibit C - Warning notice re house rules; Exhibit D - Warning notice re harassment of off-site staff; Exhibit E - Written incident from off-site staff re harassment Exhibit F - Total of 7 incident reports re verbal harassment of site staff.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (Dept 318)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Set For Trial On Jan-14-10 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 318
